userQuery: First date tonight, dinner in SoHo. What's the move?

content: For a first date in SoHo, we're going for looks that are chic and make a statement without trying too hard. Let's keep it elevated and effortlessly cool.

options.title: The Leather Maxi Look
options.description: A sleek black leather maxi skirt paired with a sheer black top, styled with knee-high black boots. Add a simple clutch to keep it sophisticated.

options.title: The Polished Edge
options.description: Pair dark wash jeans with a black off-shoulder long sleeve top and black booties. Finish with a leather jacket for that polished edge.

options.title: The Printed Maxi
options.description: A short sleeve leopard print maxi dress, styled with a simple black heel and gold earrings for a hint of glamour.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it perfectly balances edgy sophistication with a hint of allure, ideal for a memorable first date.

userQuery: Second date, I want to level it up a bit from last time. Casual bar in the West Village.

content: For a second date at a casual bar in the West Village, we're aiming for looks that are cool and effortless with a touch of elevated flair. Let's keep it chic, comfortable, and a bit unexpected.

options.title: The Edgy Leather
options.description: A sleek leather mini skirt paired with a black sheer long-sleeve top, finished with knee-high black boots. The leather adds an edge, while the sheer top keeps it intriguing and sophisticated.

options.title: The Relaxed Jean
options.description: Dark wash jeans with a black off-shoulder long sleeve top, styled with ankle booties. The off-shoulder detail adds a playful touch to this laid-back yet polished look.

options.title: The Cozy Knit Dress
options.description: A long sleeve knit dress in a soft black hue, paired with classic black boots. This look is understated yet chic, perfect for a cozy evening out in the city.

content: Look 1 is my top pick — it perfectly captures that blend of edgy and sophisticated, making it ideal for a second date where you want to impress without trying too hard.

userQuery: Date at an art gallery opening, I want to look interesting not just pretty.

content: For an art gallery opening, let's create a look that's both intriguing and chic. We're aiming for a blend of artistic flair and confident sophistication.

options.title: The Artistic Edge
options.description: Pair a leather maxi skirt with a sheer black top, adding knee-high boots for a seamless look. A structured black clutch and bold gold earrings complete this stylish ensemble.

options.title: The Modern Muse
options.description: Opt for a black off-shoulder long sleeve top with tailored black jeans, finished with sleek booties. A delicate pendant necklace and a minimalist bag add a touch of elegance.

options.title: The Statement Maxi
options.description: Choose a short sleeve printed maxi dress in a bold leopard or polka dot for a striking yet comfortable look. Add black kitten heels and understated jewelry to keep the focus on the dress.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it effortlessly combines edgy elements with an artistic twist, perfect for a gallery setting.

userQuery: Hinge date, coffee then probably a walk. Effortless but put together.

content: For a coffee date with a walk, let's create a look that's effortlessly chic and comfortable. We're going for a vibe that's relaxed yet polished.

options.title: The Casual Chic
options.description: Opt for dark wash jeans with a cream cable knit sweater. Add sleek ankle boots and a structured black coat for a touch of elegance. The neutral palette keeps it classic and versatile.

options.title: The Relaxed Edge
options.description: Pair black jeans with an off-shoulder black long sleeve top. Finish with comfortable black loafers and a lightweight trench. This look effortlessly combines comfort with a bit of edge.

options.title: The Sleek Comfort
options.description: Choose a knitted midi dress in a soft grey tone for a streamlined silhouette. Complement with white sneakers for ease during your walk and a crossbody bag to keep it hands-free.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it combines comfort and style seamlessly, perfect for a relaxed yet put-together vibe.

userQuery: Anniversary dinner somewhere fancy. I want to look stunning but not like I tried too hard.

content: For your anniversary dinner, let's aim for a look that's both stunning and effortlessly chic. We want to balance sophistication with a touch of playfulness.

options.title: The Velvet Touch
options.description: A deep emerald velvet wrap dress that flatters with its rich texture and elegant silhouette. Pair it with sleek black heels and delicate gold jewelry for a touch of luxury.

options.title: The Satin Slip
options.description: A sultry black satin slip dress that drapes beautifully, styled with strappy metallic heels and a minimalist clutch. Add a rich lip color for a confident finish.

options.title: The Chic Ensemble
options.description: An off-shoulder top paired with a sleek leather pencil skirt in deep navy. Complete the look with pointed-toe pumps and a structured handbag for an effortlessly chic appearance.

content: Look 2 is my top pick—it perfectly blends sultry elegance with a minimalist edge, making it ideal for a special evening.
Are there any specific colors or styles you want to avoid for this occasion?

userQuery: Date in an hour. What do I wear?

content: For a quick date night prep, let's focus on looks that are effortlessly chic and make you feel confident. We're going for a modern vibe that doesn't sacrifice comfort.

options.title: The Effortless Edge
options.description: A black mini skirt paired with a black off-shoulder sheer top and knee-high boots. Add a sleek, black leather jacket to keep it edgy and a small crossbody bag for a touch of practicality.

options.title: The Polished Cool
options.description: Dark wash jeans with a black off-shoulder long sleeve top and ankle booties. Layer with a tailored coat for added warmth and a structured bag to keep it sharp.

options.title: The Sleek Silhouette
options.description: A long sleeve knit dress that hugs the body just right, paired with knee-high boots for an elongated look. Opt for minimal jewelry and a clutch to keep it sleek and comfortable.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it encapsulates an edgy vibe while staying effortlessly chic and practical for a quick exit.
Is this more of a casual spot or a nicer restaurant—and is this a first date or are you already seeing each other?

userQuery: Beach date in Miami. Cute but functional.

content: For a beach date in Miami, let's focus on chic yet functional looks that embrace the warm weather and vibrant energy. We're aiming for effortless charm with a touch of playfulness.

options.title: The Breezy Maxi
options.description: A flowy, lightweight maxi dress in a soft pastel hue, perfect for catching the breeze. Pair it with comfortable espadrilles and a straw hat for a relaxed yet stylish vibe.

options.title: The Chic Co-Ord
options.description: A linen crop top and matching high-waisted shorts in a crisp white. Add a pop of color with vibrant sandals and a woven tote for a look that's as cool as it is put-together.

options.title: The Playful Mini
options.description: A fun, printed mini dress that embodies the lively spirit of Miami. Style it with flat sandals and a simple crossbody bag for ease and comfort.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it perfectly captures the essence of a beach date with its flowy silhouette and effortless charm.
